nasb.text: Between her feet he bowed, he fell, he lay; Between her feet he bowed, he fell; Where he bowed, there he fell dead.

esv.text: Between her feet he sank, he fell, he lay still; between her feet he sank, he fell; where he sank, there he fell—dead.

cnv.text: 西西拉在雅億腳前屈身、仆倒、躺臥， 在雅億腳前屈身、仆倒； 他在那裡屈身，就在那裡仆倒死亡。

ccb.text: 西西拉屈身倒下， 死在她脚前， 一动不动地躺在那里。
